2604.25231.title: DRAGON: A Benchmark for Evidence-Grounded Visual Reasoning over Diagrams
2604.25231.paper_summary: Diagram question answering (DQA) requires models to interpret structured visual representations such as charts, maps, infographics, circuit schematics, and scientific diagrams. Recent vision-language models (VLMs) often achieve high answer accuracy on these tasks, yet correct answers do not guarantee that models ground their reasoning in the diagram regions that support the prediction. Models may instead rely on textual correlations or dataset artifacts without identifying the visual evidence required to verify the answer. This limitation prevents reliable evaluation of diagram reasoning and reduces interpretability. We introduce DRAGON, a benchmark for evaluating evidence-grounded visual reasoning in diagrams. Given a diagram, a question, and the correct answer, a model must predict bounding boxes that correspond to the visual elements required to justify the answer. These evidence regions may include answer-bearing components, textual labels, legends, axes, connectors, and other supporting structures involved in the reasoning process. The DRAGON dataset contains 11,664 annotated question instances collected from six diagram QA datasets: ChartQA, Circuit-VQA, InfographicsVQA, MapIQ, MapWise, and AI2D. We release a 2,445-instance benchmark test set with human-verified reasoning evidence annotations and a standardized evaluation framework. We evaluate eight recent VLMs and analyze their ability to localize reasoning evidence across diverse diagram domains. DRAGON enables systematic evaluation of diagram reasoning and supports future research on models that ground their predictions in visual evidence.
2604.25231.paper_summary_zh: 圖表問題回答（DQA）要求模型解釋結構化的視覺表示，例如圖表、地圖、資訊圖、電路圖和科學圖。最近的視覺-語言模型（VLMs）在這些任務上通常能達到高準確率，但正確的答案並不保證模型能將其推理基於支持預測的圖表區域。模型可能會依賴文本相關性或數據集工件，而未能識別驗證答案所需的視覺證據。這一限制阻礙了對圖表推理的可靠評估，並降低了可解釋性。我們介紹了DRAGON，一個用於評估圖表中基於證據的視覺推理的基準。給定一個圖表、一個問題和正確答案，模型必須預測對應於證明答案所需的視覺元素的邊界框。這些證據區域可能包括承載答案的組件、文本標籤、圖例、坐標軸、連接器以及推理過程中涉及的其他支持結構。DRAGON數據集包含從六個圖表QA數據集中收集的11,664個標註問題實例：ChartQA、Circuit-VQA、InfographicsVQA、MapIQ、MapWise和AI2D。我們發布了一個包含2,445個實例的基準測試集，並附有經人工驗證的推理證據標註和標準化的評估框架。我們評估了八個最近的VLMs，並分析它們在不同圖表領域中定位推理證據的能力。DRAGON使得對圖表推理的系統評估成為可能，並支持未來基於視覺證據進行預測的模型研究。
2604.25231.author: Anirudh Iyengar Kaniyar Narayana Iyengar et.al.
2604.25231.authors: Anirudh Iyengar Kaniyar Narayana Iyengar, Tampu Ravi Kumar, Gaurav Najpande, Manan Suri, Dinesh Manocha, Puneet Mathur, Vivek Gupta
